name: Growing Swarm
description:
Unleash a swarm of fetcherflies to relentlessly attack an enemy, causing them to bleed for 4785 Bleed Damage over 20 seconds. 

The fetcherflies rip through the original enemy's flesh, afflicting them with Minor Vulnerability for the duration, increasing their damage taken by 5%.

Enemies near the carrier take 435 Bleed Damage every 2 seconds for the duration.

You can only have one Growing Swarm active at a time.
